arts.ttl: Josh Brownhill discusses his Burnley future as his contract comes to an end
arts.sum: Josh Brownhill is happy to focus on his football and wait to make a decision on his Burnley future at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Burnley vs. Preston North End - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Burnley and Preston North End, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Roberts, Worrall and Flemming: Burnley injury update ahead of Preston North End derby
arts.sum: Burnley will leave it as late as possible to make a decision on the availability of Connor Roberts and Zian Flemming for Saturday’s derby.
